sampleInput.campaign_message: Healthy lunch decisions in under 10 minutes for busy urban teams.
sampleInput.offer: Intro launch bundle: first-week sampler with free delivery threshold.
sampleInput.key_message: Save time without sacrificing taste, nutrition, or team convenience.
sampleInput.context: Reviewed offline product-launch sample for an executive marketing scenario walkthrough.

summary.headline: Offline product-launch simulation ready for executive review
summary.text: The offline Product Launch sample shows a moderate positive signal with light positive signal and strong directional signal. Treat this as a planning prompt for human review, not a forecast.

cards.title: Overall Reaction
cards.detail: Audience response is aggregate and synthetic; use it to decide what to test next.

cards.title: Message Acceptance
cards.detail: The promise is clearest when the time-saving benefit is paired with trust proof.

cards.title: Brand Perception
cards.detail: Add quality, delivery, and nutrition evidence before scaling the message.

cards.title: Engagement Potential
cards.detail: Short video and chat-friendly creative are likely better first tests than broad reach claims.

cards.title: Synthetic Purchase Intent
cards.detail: This is not a sales forecast or conversion guarantee; validate with approved field data.

audienceInsights: Working Adults: emphasize speed, reliability, and a clear lunch-time use case.
Urban Consumers: lead with convenience and visible quality proof.
SME Owners: frame the offer as a simple team perk with budget control.
Product launch fixture shows stronger synthetic awareness than trust, so analysts should inspect launch-message clarity before using the finding.
risksCaveats: Reviewed offline sample only; not production-ready and not connected to production campaign systems.
Not suitable for persuasion optimization, voter targeting, microtargeting, or guaranteed prediction claims.
Dashboard signals require human review before executive or public-facing use.
Offline fixture only: no live social data, private data, CRM lists, or production prediction.
recommendedNextTest: Run a small approved A/B creative test: time-saving headline versus trust-proof headline, reviewed by a human before launch.
safetyLabels: No PII, CRM lists, private messages, or voter lists
No microtargeting, persuasion optimization, or conversion guarantees

exports.status: Generated from the reviewed offline sample; review safety notes before reuse.
exports.executiveSummaryPreview: Executive review: product-launch response is moderate positive signal, trust is light positive signal, and channel reach is strong directional signal. Confirm assumptions, evidence gaps, and limitations before any launch use.

assumptions: Brand and product is Nimbus Go.
Campaign message is Healthy lunch decisions in under 10 minutes for busy urban teams.
Launch offer is Intro launch bundle: first-week sampler with free delivery threshold.
Key message is Save time without sacrificing taste, nutrition, or team convenience.
Audience focus is Working Adults, Urban Consumers, SME Owners.
Use only aggregate, synthetic, offline assumptions with no customer records or private audience data.
The review contract was validated as offline/synthetic/demo-only before conversion.
Audience reactions are aggregate simulation signals, not measured public opinion or individual behavior.
No approved field data or backtest evidence is attached to this bridge output.
evidenceGaps: No real social platform APIs, private social scraping, private groups, CRM records, voter lists, or direct messages were used.
Treat outputs as synthetic simulation estimates unless separately validated with approved field data or backtests.
Offline sample mode uses deterministic sample data and is not evidence from the field.
limitations: Reviewed offline sample only; not production-ready and not connected to production campaign systems.
Not suitable for persuasion optimization, voter targeting, microtargeting, or guaranteed prediction claims.
Dashboard signals require human review before executive or public-facing use.
Offline workbench sample only; not a production simulator replacement.
Deterministic fixtures only by default; no live social APIs, private social data, credentials, PII, voter lists, or CRM data.

source.sourceLabel: Reviewed SocialSense sample, no live data

reviewMetadata.uncertainty: Directional synthetic aggregate sample only; use for human review and next-test planning, not prediction.
